category_sources: Official ktfmt documentation says ktfmt pretty-prints and formats Kotlin code.
source_facts.description says ktfmt is a Kotlin code formatter.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is ktfmt - the Kotlin code formatter.
docs_sources: Official ktfmt site provides usage instructions for IntelliJ, Gradle, Maven, and command line.
source_facts.homepage is the official ktfmt documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes ktfmt as a non-customizable Kotlin formatter for consistent output.
